title: Plaza of the Daders
content:
{{Top|ncl}}
{{Noncanon|legends=1}}
[[File:Plaza_of_the_Daders.jpg|thumb|The Plaza of the Daders]]
The '''Plaza of the Daders''' was an open area in the [[New Galactic Empire]] capital of [[Alderaan (The Star Wars)|Alderaan]], where the [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Cos Dashit]] and the [[Supreme Tribunal]] reviewed Imperial troops and gave speeches.

Thousands of troops could fit into its expanse. [[Stardestroyer]]s performed barrel rolls above as part of the pomp and circumstance.

The Emperor conferred the [[Governor/Legends|Governorship]] of the [[Aquilaean system]] on [[Crispin Hoedaack]] here, and [[Clieg Whitsun]], a [[Spy/Legends|spy]] reported on this to [[Bail Antilles/Legends|Bail Antilles]] in an [[Alderaanian nightclub]].

==Behind the scenes==
The Plaza of the Daders was renamed the "Plaza of the Donns" in the first draft, and was located on [[Granicus]].

==Appearances==
*[[The Star Wars 1|''The Star Wars'' 1]] {{1st}}
